privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.desc: Your privacy is important to us.
privacy.section_1_1_text: name, surname, phone number, email address.
privacy.section_1_3_text: IP address, browser type, device information (for security and analytics).
privacy.section_2_1: Your phone number is displayed under your listing so buyers can contact you.
privacy.section_2_2: Your email address is used only for technical notifications and important alerts.
privacy.section_2_3: We do not sell your personal information to third parties!
privacy.section_3_text: All data is transmitted through encrypted channels. Only platform technical support has access to data.
privacy.section_4_text: You can update your information or delete your account at any time from your personal account. To delete data, contact us at vela7az@gmail.com.
privacy.section_5_text: Our site uses cookies to improve functionality. You can delete or block these files in your browser, but this may affect some features.
privacy.consent: By registering on the site, you consent to the processing of your personal information in accordance with the conditions of this policy.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.desc: This document applies to buyers, sellers, and all site visitors.
terms.section_1_1: VELA.az (hereinafter "Platform") is an online resource that provides users with the opportunity to post free ads related to event clothing and view these ads.
terms.section_1_2: The Platform is not a party to any contract between buyer and seller. All terms of sale, rental, deposit, delivery and other matters are matters agreed upon solely between the users themselves.
terms.section_1_3: By using the Platform, you acknowledge that you have read and accept these terms.
terms.section_2_1: Registration is required to post ads. During registration, you must provide correct name, surname, contact number and email.
terms.section_2_2: Do not share your account with others. You are responsible for all transactions made with your account.
terms.section_2_3: Persons under 18 years of age may register only with parental permission.
terms.section_3_1: The seller is fully responsible for the content of the ad posted, the accuracy of the photos, the legality of the product and the accuracy of its description.
terms.section_3_2: Posting ads for prohibited goods (weapons, drugs, counterfeit documents, hazardous materials, etc.) is strictly prohibited. Such ads will be deleted immediately, the user will be blocked and information will be provided to the relevant authorities.
terms.section_3_3: The Platform reserves the right to check, edit or delete ads if they violate the rules.
terms.section_4_1: Under the ad, there will be the seller's phone number or message form. All negotiations, agreements, payments and delivery are carried out directly between the parties.
terms.section_4_2: In rental transactions, price, period, deposit, penalties and return terms must be agreed in writing (WhatsApp, SMS, etc.) by the parties. The Platform is not responsible for the implementation of these terms.
terms.section_5_1: The Platform does not guarantee the quality, cleanliness, condition or timely delivery of the product sold or rented.
terms.section_5_2: Financial losses, damages, deception and other problems arising between users are resolved only between the parties themselves.
terms.section_5_3: The Platform may be temporarily unavailable due to technical reasons (server problems, etc.). We do not bear responsibility for losses incurred in such cases.
terms.section_6_text: These terms may be updated from time to time. Amendments shall take effect from the date they are posted on the site.

seller_agreement.title: SELLER AGREEMENT
seller_agreement.desc: This document applies to all individuals and legal entities who post listings, sell or rent products on the Vela.az platform.
seller_agreement.intro: This document applies to all individuals and legal entities (hereinafter "Seller") who post listings, sell or rent products on the Vela.az platform (hereinafter "Platform"). By posting a listing, the Seller is deemed to have fully and unconditionally accepted the following terms.
seller_agreement.s1_1: The Platform provides the Seller with the technical ability to post free listings about event clothing, accessories and related products, as well as to sell or rent these products.
seller_agreement.s1_2: The Platform is not a party to any sale, rental, deposit, delivery or other transaction between the seller and the buyer. All agreements, obligations and payments are concluded and executed directly between the seller and the buyer.
seller_agreement.s1_3: Currently, the Platform does NOT CHARGE the seller any commission, subscription fee or any other payment. The Seller does not pay any amount to the Platform for posting listings, selling or renting their products.
seller_agreement.s1_4: If paid services are introduced by the Platform in the future (for example: featured listings, premium store packages, high-frequency advertising, extended statistical capabilities, etc.), the Seller will be notified at least 30 (thirty) calendar days in advance via email or in-platform notification. Sellers using paid services after that date agree to pay the applicable tariffs. Sellers who do not wish to use paid services may continue to use the free basic services.
seller_agreement.s2_1: The Seller declares and warrants that each product listed is their property, was legally acquired, and that they have the right to sell, rent, or otherwise put it into circulation.
seller_agreement.s2_2: The Seller must provide accurate, precise, complete and non-misleading information in the listing. Product photos must reflect the current condition of the product (unretouched, real images).
seller_agreement.s2_3: In rental transactions, the deposit amount, cleaning conditions, liability for damage, penalties for late return and return procedures must be clearly communicated and agreed upon by the Seller to the buyer in writing (via WhatsApp, SMS, email or in-platform messaging).
seller_agreement.s2_4: The Seller bears full responsibility for the execution of all contracts, obligations and conditions concluded with the buyer.
seller_agreement.s3_1_head: 3.1. Posting listings for the following products is strictly prohibited:
seller_agreement.s3_1_a: Goods prohibited by the laws of the Republic of Azerbaijan (weapons, narcotics, psychotropic substances, counterfeit documents, human organs, hazardous chemical substances, etc.);
seller_agreement.s3_1_b: Counterfeit, fake brand products (imitations of luxury brands whose authenticity has not been confirmed);
seller_agreement.s3_1_c: Clothing that is unusable, seriously defective, or does not meet hygienic standards;
seller_agreement.s3_1_d: Products contrary to moral norms, public order or national-moral values.
seller_agreement.s3_2_head: 3.2. The following actions are strictly prohibited:
seller_agreement.s3_2_a: Spam, insults, discourtesy, racist, nationalist, religious hatred or expressions promoting violence;
seller_agreement.s3_2_b: Sabotaging, spreading false information or demeaning other users under their listings;
seller_agreement.s3_2_c: Conducting illegal financial transactions using the Platform (money laundering, fraud, etc.).
seller_agreement.s3_3: If prohibited activity is detected, the Platform has the right to immediately block the Seller's account, delete all their listings and, if necessary, contact law enforcement agencies. The Platform bears no responsibility for any financial losses resulting from blocking.
seller_agreement.s4_1: The Platform is not responsible for any disputes, financial losses, fraud, damage, delays or other problems arising between the seller and the buyer. All such cases must be resolved solely between the seller and the buyer.
seller_agreement.s4_2: The Platform does not guarantee the quality, cleanliness, size compatibility, authenticity, safety, delivery time, deposit return or return conditions of the product shown in the listing.
seller_agreement.s4_3: The Platform may be temporarily unavailable due to technical reasons (server problems, internet provider restrictions, natural disasters, government intervention, etc.). The Platform is not responsible for any losses incurred by the Seller or the buyer in such cases.
seller_agreement.s4_4: The Seller ensures that the content placed on the Platform (text, images, video, etc.) does not violate copyright. All responsibility for copyright infringement falls on the Seller.
seller_agreement.s5_1: The Platform has the right to temporarily or permanently block the Seller's account and delete their listings without giving any reason or warning. This is especially applicable when rules are violated, suspicious activity occurs, or numerous complaints are received from other users.
seller_agreement.s5_2: The Platform has the right to unilaterally change, add to, or cancel the terms of this agreement at any time. Changes take effect from the moment they are posted on the site. The Seller is obliged to follow changes.
seller_agreement.s5_3: The Platform reserves the right to introduce service fees, commissions, subscription fees or other payments in the future (pursuant to Article 1.4 of this agreement).
seller_agreement.s6_1: This agreement comes into force from the moment the Seller places their first listing and is valid for an indefinite period.
seller_agreement.s6_2: The Seller may delete their account and cancel all their listings at any time from the "personal account" section. After the account is deleted, this agreement is automatically cancelled.
seller_agreement.s6_3: The Platform may unilaterally cancel this agreement by notifying the Seller in writing (via email or in-platform notification) 14 (fourteen) days in advance. If the reason for cancellation is a serious violation of the rules, immediate cancellation may be applied without warning.
seller_agreement.s7_1: The Platform displays the Seller's personal information (name, surname, phone number, email address) only for the purpose of enabling contact with buyers under the listing, or provides it to relevant government authorities when required.
seller_agreement.s7_2: The Platform does not sell the Seller's information to third parties or share it for advertising purposes (except when legally required).
seller_agreement.s8_1: All official notifications are sent to the email address provided by the Seller during registration or via the in-platform notification system. Messages sent to these addresses are considered received by the Seller.
seller_agreement.s8_2: Disputes arising between the Seller and the Platform are regulated by the legislation of the Republic of Azerbaijan. Courts of general jurisdiction in the city of Baku are competent to hear disputes.
seller_agreement.s8_3_pre: For the Seller's questions, complaints and suggestions:

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Welcome to VELA - the platform where every style finds its moment
about.what_is_desc1: Vela is an online classifieds platform in Azerbaijan for selling, buying, or renting clothes for weddings, engagements, birthdays, and other events.
about.what_is_desc2: We bring sellers and buyers together. The seller shows their clothing in a listing, and the buyer sees the listing and contacts the seller directly. All agreements (price, rental period, deposit, delivery, return) are made directly between the seller and the buyer.
about.we_do_1: We allow sellers to post listings for free.
about.we_do_2: We provide filters, search, and description tools so buyers can easily find the clothing they are looking for.
about.we_do_3: We put simple rules in place for the safety of both parties.
about.we_dont_1: We do not store, clean, or deliver clothing.
about.we_dont_2: We are not responsible for sales and rental transactions.
about.goal_desc: Our goal is to provide a reliable, simple, and clean online space for event clothing.
